emergency_definition: carbon monoxide alarm tied to HVAC equipment

BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Arctic Air HVAC. How can we assist you today?
What brings you to call us today?
May I have your name and phone number, please?
I'm going to connect you with one of our representatives. Please hold for just a moment.
We're having trouble connecting you. Please hold for another attempt.
Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Thank you for calling Arctic Air HVAC. Have a great day!

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Arctic Air HVAC. Our office is currently closed.
What is the reason for your call?
Is this an emergency related to your HVAC equipment?
I'm going to connect you with our emergency team. Can you please provide more details about the issue?
We're having trouble connecting you. We'll have someone call you back within 10 minutes.
I'd be happy to schedule a call for you for the next available time slot. Can you please provide some details about your request?
Thank you for calling Arctic Air HVAC. We'll be in touch soon.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We have your urgent request and our dispatch team will reach out very soon

tool_invocation_note: ServiceTitan only, do not discuss financing options
